# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React-based frontend application using:
- **Next.js Pages Router** for routing and page structure
- **TypeScript** for type safety
- **Vite** for fast development and building
- **Supabase** as the backend (database, auth, edge functions)
- **Tailwind CSS** with custom design tokens for styling
- **React Query** for server state management

## Key Architectural Decisions

- **Component-based structure**: Modular components organized by feature (attendance, employee-profile, etc.)
- **Supabase integration**: Real-time database with PostgreSQL, authentication, and serverless functions
- **AI-powered features**: Edge functions handle complex tasks like attendance file parsing
- **Responsive design**: Mobile-first approach with custom CSS variables
- **Type safety**: Full TypeScript coverage with generated Supabase types

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Core Entrypoints
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entrypoint, renders the root App component
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main dashboard/home page
- `src/App.tsx`: Root component with routing setup

### Key Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout wrapper with sidebar and topbar
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Logo component with variant support
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: Custom navigation link with active state handling
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Employee search and selection component
- `src/components/attendance/AttendanceUploadFlow.tsx`: Complex flow for uploading and parsing attendance files
- `src/components/employee-profile/AttendanceTab.tsx`: Employee attendance records display

### Libraries and Utilities
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for className merging)
- `src/lib/attendance-format.ts`: Attendance time and hour formatting
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based access control functions
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: Auto-generated TypeScript types from database schema

### Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Vite build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration
- `package.json`: Dependencies and scripts

## Business Logic and Data Flow

### Attendance Management
- **Upload Flow**: Files are uploaded via `AttendanceUploadFlow`, parsed by AI edge function (`parse-attendance-ai`)
- **Data Processing**: Parsed records are validated against employee codes, unmatched records handled
- **Storage**: Records stored in `attendance_records` table with status calculations (late, OT, etc.)
- **Display**: `AttendanceTab` shows monthly records with summaries

### Employee Management
- **Profiles**: Tabbed interface for viewing employee details (attendance, leave, payroll, etc.)
- **Search**: `SearchableEmployeeSelect` provides searchable employee dropdowns
- **Roles**: Role-based permissions control feature access

### Authentication and Authorization
- **Supabase Auth**: User authentication with role-based access
- **Company Isolation**: All data scoped to user's company
- **Permissions**: Functions like `hasRole`, `canAccess` control UI visibility

## Database Schema Highlights

- **Companies**: Multi-tenant structure
- **Employees**: User profiles with roles and departments
- **Attendance Records**: Time tracking with calculated fields
- **Leave Requests**: Approval workflow
- **Payroll**: Generated from attendance and salary data
- **Settings**: Company-wide configurations (shifts, holidays, etc.)

## Development Workflow

- **Local Development**: `npm run dev` starts Vite dev server
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E
- **Linting**: ESLint configuration
- **Build**: `npm run build` creates production bundle

## Edge Functions

- `parse-attendance-ai`: AI-powered parsing of Excel attendance files
- `generate-payroll`: Payroll calculation and PDF generation
- `send-notification`: Notification system

This system provides a complete HR suite with modern web technologies and AI assistance for data processing.
